title: 有馬記念の後に・白星

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O is the victor in her duel with
Mr. C.B.!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, it seems their battle has only just
begun. The two racers banter over who will win
their next race, already looking to their futures.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Symboli Rudolf and Maruzensky
watch over the pair of excited racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them can't wait to see the day when
Sakura Chiyono O shocks and awes the world with
her speed.
